content:
# IBM Software Engineer – Large Scale Language Models Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your IBM Software Engineer – Large Scale Language Models Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** New York
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from IBM
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

IBM is offering a Software Engineer – Large Scale Language Models Intern internship position in New York. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research IBM's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your IBM interview and increase your chances of success.
